clusters.justification: These terms share robust co-activation patterns within corticolimbic and salience circuitry (e.g., insula, amygdala, anterior cingulate), representing the overarching domain of emotional reactivity, valence, and autonomic regulation.
This cluster maps fundamentally onto mesolimbic and ventromedial prefrontal pathways, capturing the macro-level domain of incentive computation, reward-based learning, and value-driven choice.

Converging within the Default Mode Network (e.g., mPFC, TPJ, precuneus), this domain represents the functional integration of internally directed self-referential thought and the projective representations of other minds and social contexts.
